'''Monfre''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] [[Cerebus (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Cerebus'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
